summary.summary: Bump APP_DEV_VERSION in Config.xcconfig from 0.8.4.7 to 0.8.4.8.
summary.userFacingImpact: The change updates the APP_DEV_VERSION value (development-version metadata) in Config.xcconfig as shown in the commit and diff; the provided diff shows only this single line change and no other functional code edits. There is insufficient evidence in the supplied sources to guarantee this has no runtime or user-visible effects, so human review is recommended if confirmation is required.
